description_for_human: FyPlus Dental Clinic - İstanbul'da premium diş kliniği. İmplant, zirkonyum, gülüş tasarımı ve daha fazlası.
description_for_model: FyPlus Dental Clinic is a premium dental clinic in Istanbul, Turkey offering implant surgery, zirconium crowns, teeth whitening, orthodontics, Hollywood Smile design, root canal treatment, pediatric dentistry, and digital dentistry services. The clinic operates Monday-Friday 09:00-19:00 and Saturday 10:00-16:00.
